member.name: M:TopicMessage.OfSingle(Proto.ConsensusTopicResponse)
member.summary: Create a new topic message from a response protobuf.

member.name: M:TopicMessage.OfMany(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Proto.ConsensusTopicResponse})
member.summary: Create a new topic message from a list of response's protobuf.

member.name: P:TopicMessage.ConsensusTimestamp
member.summary: The consensus timestamp of the message in seconds.nanoseconds

member.name: P:TopicMessage.RunningHash
member.summary: The new running hash of the topic that received the message

member.name: P:TopicMessage.SequenceNumber
member.summary: The sequence number of the message relative to all other messages for the same topic
